Tiny moments,

First Smile is a quiet, unhurried photography studio built around one idea — the first weeks and years pass faster than anyone is ready for. We slow them down, one frame at a time.

What We Shoot

Five chapters, one story.

From the first days home to the family you've grown into — pick the chapter you're in.

01 Newborn Gentle, in-home or studio sessions for babies 5–21 days old. Soft wraps, quiet light, no rushing. ↗
02 Baby Milestone sittings for the sitting-up, almost-crawling, first-tooth months of the first year. ↗
03 Kids Playful, candid sessions that catch real personality instead of forced smiles at the camera. ↗
04 Maternity Soft, sculptural portraits in the last trimester — for the body and the wait, both worth remembering. ↗
05 Family Relaxed portraits for the whole household — grandparents, pets, and everyone in between welcome. ↗

About First Smile

We photograph the in-between.

Not the posed, stiff version of family life — the real one. The way your toddler actually laughs. The exact weight of your newborn's hand around your finger. The look on your face you don't get to see in the moment, but will want to keep forever.

Every session is unhurried, led by natural light, and shaped around your family — not a template.

"They photographed our son's first six weeks like they understood exactly how fast it was all going. We didn't pose for a single picture — and they're the ones we look at most."
— A First Smile Family
